LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. RESPONDENTS CHANCELLOR CHARLES B. REED OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY, IN HIS OFFICIAL CAPACITY AND THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE'S MOTION TO DIMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE IS GRANTED. A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION WAS FILED BY PETITIONER ON MARCH 4, 2014. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Dimiss For Failure To Prosecute; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. RESPONDENTS CHANCELLOR CHARLES B. REED OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY, in his official capacity and THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE'S Motion To Dimiss For Failure To Prosecute is granted. A notice of non-opposition was filed by Petitioner on March 4, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
